message:
fix: allow apply_patch to accept absolute paths under working directory

Absolute paths like /app/eigen.py were rejected with "absolute paths
not allowed" even when the working directory was /app/. Now strips the
rootDir prefix from absolute paths that fall under it, while still
rejecting paths outside the working directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
